nodes.label: Prototype README
observations: Root-level documentation for the prototype bundle
Describes 4 working pages: wizard.html, index.html, dynamic.html, educator.html
Describes CI pipeline with ml-gate.yml enforcing NFR-9 (accuracy) and NFR-10 (robustness) gates
Documents 3 ML pipelines: static MLP, dynamic Transformer, CI gate pipeline
Maps implementation to PDR requirements (S-01, S-05, S-06, EPIC-15)

nodes.label: Home page (entry point)
observations: Entry-point landing page for the prototype bundle
Dark-themed bioluminescent UI design
Links to 4 pages: wizard.html, index.html, dynamic.html, educator.html
Displays CI/release-gate section describing ML gate workflow
Contains section listing bundle map with all file references
Uses CSS custom properties for theming (--bg, --panel, --accent, etc.)
Badges: On-device, MediaPipe Hands, ONNX MLP, Transformer, WCAG-conscious
